working_on: Close S-0121 audit follow-ups: Issue #87 (retire 14 ADR amendment blocks + 3 governed-doc soft-warns + ADR 0062), Issue #88 (validator tiered runtime + per-phase timing + regression soft-warn + ADR 0063), Issue #89 (refine scan_orphans ops-doc-uncited axis).

scope_delivery.explanation: Delivered the approved plan in full: Issues #87 / #88 / #89 closed. Two new ADRs (0062 + 0063), two first-exercise readiness notes, four new validator soft-warns (state_md_row_count / adr_consequences_amendment_header / handoff_long_resolved_sections / validator_runtime_phase_regression), per-phase timing instrumentation, scan_orphans axis refinement, 14 ADR amendment blocks retired across 8 ADRs. One follow-up Issue (#90) filed for the structural-phase regression that surfaced during S-0126's own validator runs — folded the optional regression soft-warn from #88 into the session per the user's anti-deferral pushback during plan mode.

outcome_summary: Closed three S-0121 audit follow-ups in one session per the plan at i-want-to-close-dynamic-tulip.md. Issue #89: refined scan_orphans.axis_ops_doc_uncited from archive-text-substring (19/22 false-positives) to AND-combined predicate (refs<5 AND boot-unreachable; operations/README.md as visit-but-don't-traverse leaf); zero candidates live; 6 new pytests. Issue #88: tiered runtime targets (structural<500ms / graph-audit<5s / total<6s) per new ADR 0063; per-phase timing in validate-history.jsonl (duration_ms renamed cleanly to duration_total_ms); new validator_runtime_phase_regression soft-warn (1.5x target across 3 consecutive runs with current-run participating in window); 9 new pytests; first-exercise readiness note. Issue #87 part (a): retired 14 inline-amendment blocks across 8 engine ADRs (5 pure-narration deletes + 3 contract-refinement folds); ADR 0049 lost Decision 3 (retired at S-0083), gained Decision 5 (defer-handle from S-0100); ADR 0056 got heaviest restructure (5 amendments compounded into Layer 1 + Scoped surface + Layer 3 table); grep returns empty post-retirement. Issue #87 part (b): three governed-doc soft-warns (state_md_row_count threshold 180 / adr_consequences_amendment_header zero-tolerance / handoff_long_resolved_sections >5 OR >10 sessions old) per new ADR 0062; 14 new pytests; first-exercise readiness note. Side-effect win: adr_consequences_deliverable_audit soft-warn cleared (ADR 0049 rewrite removed the trigger phrase). First-exercise gate T1-A closed naturally for validator_runtime_phase_regression: median 3705ms structural exceeded 750ms threshold across 3 consecutive runs (likely chromadb open in validate_shared_state_health misclassified as structural); filed Issue #90 for T1-B investigation. 1213 pytests pass. 3 MemPalace decision drawers filed.
